case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. KATHLEEN MCCANN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MCCANN, KATHLEEN DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF FELICIA CHEN IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO ENTER UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
ORDER ON PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCANN, KATHLEEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 640 FRANCISCO STREET #1202, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94133 $6,788.60 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,788.60, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $40.36 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MCCANN, KATHLEEN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MCCANN, KATHLEEN
